name: gaptrav_eq_5m
label: gaptrav · 5m · equities
method: The gaptrav signal run on liquid US equities at 5m on real Alpaca bars, across 8 symbols. Tests whether the zone/reversion logic transfers from crypto to equities and which timeframe carries it.
risk: Paper, resolved from real Alpaca bars. Research/data-collection — no edge claimed; gathering multi-symbol/timeframe numbers.

provenance.hypothesis: gaptrav has a tradable edge on equities at 5m.
